revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{神社 |名称 = 御嶽神社 |画像={{画像募集中|cat=板橋区}} |所在地 = [[東京都]][[板橋区]][[桜川 (板橋区)|桜川]]1-4-6 |地…」
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 御嶽神社 |画像={{画像募集中|cat=板橋区}} |所在地 = [[東京都]][[板橋区]][[桜川 (板橋区)|桜川]]1-4-6 |地図 = |祭神 = [[金山彦神|金山彦命、金山姫命]]、[[ヤマトタケル|倭健命]] |社格 = |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = 桜川御嶽神社、上板橋御嶽神社 |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''御嶽神社'''（みたけじんじゃ）は、[[東京都]][[板橋区]]の[[神社]]。
== 概要 == 創建年代は不明である。当地には昔からある神社は無く、[[15世紀]]中期の[[大田道灌]]の[[江戸城]]築城の際に、立ち退きを命じられて当地に移転してきた宝田家の私的な[[稲荷神社]]しかなかった。そのため誰もが気兼ねなく参拝できる神社を設置すべく、[[武蔵御嶽神社]]か[[金櫻神社]]から[[分霊]]を勧請して創建したという<ref name="神社">板橋区教育委員会 編『いたばしの神社 (文化財シリーズ第36集)』板橋区教育委員会、1981年、89-90p</ref>。
当社には、毎年[[3月8日]]に[[ダイコン|大根]]で鶴亀の飾りを作って、山盛りの飯を供える「毘射祭」がある<ref name="神社"></ref>。
== 交通アクセス == *[[上板橋駅]]より徒歩11分。
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 参考文献 == *板橋区教育委員会 編『いたばしの神社 (文化財シリーズ第36集)』板橋区教育委員会、1981年
{{Pref-stub|pref=東京都}} {{buddhism-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みたけしんしや いたはしくさくらかわ}} [[Category:板橋区の神社]] [[Category:御嶽神社]]

== 概要 == 創建年代は不明である。当地には昔からある神社は無く、[[15世紀]]中期の[[大田道灌]]の[[江戸城]]築城の際に、立ち退きを命じられて当地に移転してきた宝田家の私的な[[稲荷神社]]しかなかった。そのため誰もが気兼ねなく参拝できる神社を設置すべく、[[武蔵御嶽神社]]か[[金櫻神社]]から[[分霊]]を勧請して創建したという<ref name="神社">板橋区教育委員会 編『いたばしの神社 (文化財シリーズ第36集)』板橋区教育委員会、1981年、89-90p</ref>。
当社には、毎年[[3月8日]]に[[ダイコン|大根]]で鶴亀の飾りを作って、山盛りの飯を供える「毘射祭」がある<ref name="神社"></ref>。
== 摂末社 == *稲荷神社 *神明社
== 氏子区域 == *[[桜川 (板橋区)|桜川]]1丁目の一部 *[[上板橋]]1～3丁目
== 交通アクセス == *[[上板橋駅]]より徒歩11分。

== 参考文献 == *板橋区教育委員会 編『いたばしの神社 (文化財シリーズ第36集)』板橋区教育委員会、1981年

{{神社 |名称 = 御嶽神社 |画像=[[File:Mitake-jinja entrance 2022-11-13.jpg|250px]]
鳥居と拝殿 {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E}}}} |所在地 = [[東京都]][[板橋区]][[桜川 (板橋区)|桜川]]1-4-6 |位置={{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[金山彦神|金山彦命、金山姫命]]、[[ヤマトタケル|倭健命]] |社格 = |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = 桜川御嶽神社、上板橋御嶽神社 |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''御嶽神社'''（みたけじんじゃ）は、[[東京都]][[板橋区]][[桜川 (板橋区)|桜川]]にある[[神社]]。地名を冠して'''桜川御嶽神社'''（さくらがわ みたけじんじゃ）、'''上板橋御嶽神社'''（かみいたばし みたけじんじゃ）とも称する。 == 概要 == 創建年代は不明である。当地には昔からある神社は無く、[[15世紀]]中期の[[太田道灌]]の[[江戸城]]築城の際に、立ち退きを命じられて当地に移転してきた宝田家の私的な[[稲荷神社]]しかなかった。そのため誰もが気兼ねなく参拝できる神社を設置すべく、[[武蔵御嶽神社]]か[[金櫻神社]]から[[分霊]]を勧請して創建したという板橋区教育委員会 編『いたばしの神社 (文化財シリーズ第36集)』板橋区教育委員会、1981年、89-90p。 当社には、毎年[[3月8日]]に[[ダイコン|大根]]で鶴亀の飾りを作って、山盛りの飯を供える「毘射祭」がある。 File:Mitake-jinja hall of worship 2022-11-13.jpg|拝殿 == 摂末社 == *稲荷神社 *神明社 == 氏子区域 == *[[桜川 (板橋区)|桜川]]1丁目の一部 *[[上板橋]]1～3丁目 == 交通アクセス == *[[上板橋駅]]より徒歩11分。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == *板橋区教育委員会 編『いたばしの神社 (文化財シリーズ第36集)』板橋区教育委員会、1981年 == 外部リンク == {{Commonscat|Mitake-jinja (Itabashi)}} * [https://www.city.itabashi.tokyo.jp/bunka/bunkazi/bunkazai/shozaichi/1004875.html 御嶽神社のご案内] - 板橋区 {{Pref-stub|pref=東京都}} {{buddhism-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みたけしんしや いたはしくさくらかわ}} [[Category:板橋区の神社]] [[Category:御嶽神社]]

{{神社 |名称 = 御嶽神社 |画像=[[File:Mitake-jinja entrance 2022-11-13.jpg|250px]]
鳥居と拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E}}}} |所在地 = [[東京都]][[板橋区]][[桜川 (板橋区)|桜川]]1-4-6 |位置={{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[金山彦神|金山彦命、金山姫命]]、[[ヤマトタケル|倭健命]] |社格 = |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = 桜川御嶽神社、上板橋御嶽神社 |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''御嶽神社'''（みたけじんじゃ）は、[[東京都]][[板橋区]][[桜川 (板橋区)|桜川]]にある[[神社]]。地名を冠して'''桜川御嶽神社'''（さくらがわ みたけじんじゃ）、'''上板橋御嶽神社'''（かみいたばし みたけじんじゃ）とも称する。 == 概要 == 創建年代は不明である。当地には昔からある神社は無く、[[15世紀]]中期の[[太田道灌]]の[[江戸城]]築城の際に、立ち退きを命じられて当地に移転してきた宝田家の私的な[[稲荷神社]]しかなかった。そのため誰もが気兼ねなく参拝できる神社を設置すべく、[[武蔵御嶽神社]]か[[金櫻神社]]から[[分霊]]を勧請して創建したという板橋区教育委員会 編『いたばしの神社 (文化財シリーズ第36集)』板橋区教育委員会、1981年、89-90p。 当社には、毎年[[3月8日]]に[[ダイコン|大根]]で鶴亀の飾りを作って、山盛りの飯を供える「毘射祭」がある。 File:Mitake-jinja hall of worship 2022-11-13.jpg|拝殿 == 摂末社 == *稲荷神社 *神明社 == 氏子区域 == *[[桜川 (板橋区)|桜川]]1丁目の一部 *[[上板橋]]1～3丁目 == 交通アクセス == *[[上板橋駅]]より徒歩11分。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == *板橋区教育委員会 編『いたばしの神社 (文化財シリーズ第36集)』板橋区教育委員会、1981年 == 外部リンク == {{Commonscat|Mitake-jinja (Itabashi)}} * [https://www.city.itabashi.tokyo.jp/bunka/bunkazi/bunkazai/shozaichi/1004875.html 御嶽神社のご案内] - 板橋区 {{Pref-stub|pref=東京都}} {{buddhism-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みたけしんしや いたはしくさくらかわ}} [[Category:板橋区の神社]] [[Category:御嶽神社]]

{{神社 |名称 = 御嶽神社 |画像=[[File:Mitake-jinja entrance 2022-11-13.jpg|250px]]
鳥居と拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E}}}} |所在地 = [[東京都]][[板橋区]][[桜川 (板橋区)|桜川]]1-4-6 |位置={{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[金山彦神|金山彦命、金山姫命]]、[[ヤマトタケル|倭健命]] |社格 = |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = 桜川御嶽神社、上板橋御嶽神社 |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''御嶽神社'''（みたけじんじゃ）は、[[東京都]][[板橋区]][[桜川 (板橋区)|桜川]]にある[[神社]]。地名を冠して'''桜川御嶽神社'''（さくらがわ みたけじんじゃ）、'''上板橋御嶽神社'''（かみいたばし みたけじんじゃ）とも称する。 == 概要 == 創建年代は不明である。当地には昔からある神社は無く、[[15世紀]]中期の[[太田道灌]]の[[江戸城]]築城の際に、立ち退きを命じられて当地に移転してきた宝田家の私的な[[稲荷神社]]しかなかった。そのため誰もが気兼ねなく参拝できる神社を設置すべく、[[武蔵御嶽神社]]か[[金櫻神社]]から[[分霊]]を勧請して創建したという板橋区教育委員会 編『いたばしの神社 (文化財シリーズ第36集)』板橋区教育委員会、1981年、89-90p。 当社には、毎年[[3月8日]]に[[ダイコン|大根]]で鶴亀の飾りを作って、山盛りの飯を供える「毘射祭」がある。 File:Mitake-jinja hall of worship 2022-11-13.jpg|拝殿 == 摂末社 == *稲荷神社 *神明社 == 氏子区域 == *[[桜川 (板橋区)|桜川]]1丁目の一部 *[[上板橋]]1～3丁目 == 交通アクセス == *[[上板橋駅]]より徒歩11分。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == *板橋区教育委員会 編『いたばしの神社 (文化財シリーズ第36集)』板橋区教育委員会、1981年 == 外部リンク == {{Commonscat|Mitake-jinja (Itabashi)}} * [https://www.city.itabashi.tokyo.jp/bunka/bunkazi/bunkazai/shozaichi/1004875.html 御嶽神社のご案内] - 板橋区 {{Pref-stub|pref=東京都}} {{buddhism-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みたけしんしや いたはしくさくらかわ}} [[Category:板橋区の神社]] [[Category:御嶽神社]] [[Category:mass imported shinto cult pages needing dummy edit for attribution and to be reviewed if a redirect and jawiki link reviewing]][[ja:御嶽神社 (板橋区)]][[Category:qq]]

{{神社 |名称 = 御嶽神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|image=[[File:Mitake-jinja entrance 2022-11-13.jpg|250px]]
鳥居と拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E}}}} | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|location = [[東京都]][[板橋区]][[桜川 (板橋区)|桜川]]1-4-6 |位置={{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E|display=inline,title}} | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|deity = [[金山彦神|金山彦命、金山姫命]]、[[ヤマトタケル|倭健命]] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|type = |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = 桜川御嶽神社、上板橋御嶽神社 |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = }} '''御嶽神社'''（みたけじんじゃ）は、[[東京都]][[板橋区]][[桜川 (板橋区)|桜川]]にある[[神社]]。地名を冠して'''桜川御嶽神社'''（さくらがわ みたけじんじゃ）、'''上板橋御嶽神社'''（かみいたばし みたけじんじゃ）とも称する。 == 概要 == 創建年代は不明である。当地には昔からある神社は無く、[[15世紀]]中期の[[太田道灌]]の[[江戸城]]築城の際に、立ち退きを命じられて当地に移転してきた宝田家の私的な[[稲荷神社]]しかなかった。そのため誰もが気兼ねなく参拝できる神社を設置すべく、[[武蔵御嶽神社]]か[[金櫻神社]]から[[分霊]]を勧請して創建したという板橋区教育委員会 編『いたばしの神社 (文化財シリーズ第36集)』板橋区教育委員会、1981年、89-90p。 当社には、毎年[[3月8日]]に[[ダイコン|大根]]で鶴亀の飾りを作って、山盛りの飯を供える「毘射祭」がある。 File:Mitake-jinja hall of worship 2022-11-13.jpg|拝殿 == 摂末社 == *稲荷神社 *神明社 == 氏子区域 == *[[桜川 (板橋区)|桜川]]1丁目の一部 *[[上板橋]]1～3丁目 == 交通アクセス == *[[上板橋駅]]より徒歩11分。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == *板橋区教育委員会 編『いたばしの神社 (文化財シリーズ第36集)』板橋区教育委員会、1981年 == 外部リンク == {{Commonscat|Mitake-jinja (Itabashi)}} * [https://www.city.itabashi.tokyo.jp/bunka/bunkazi/bunkazai/shozaichi/1004875.html 御嶽神社のご案内] - 板橋区 {{Pref-stub|pref=東京都}} {{buddhism-stub}} {{citation needed:みたけしんしや いたはしくさくらかわ}} [[Category:板橋区の神社]] [[Category:Ontake Shrines]] [[Category:mass imported shinto cult pages needing dummy edit for attribution and to be reviewed if a redirect and jawiki link reviewing]][[ja:御嶽神社 (板橋区)]][[Category:qq]][[Category:Pages needing attribution]]

{{神社 |名称 = 御嶽神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|image=[[File:Mitake-jinja entrance 2022-11-13.jpg|250px]]
鳥居と拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E}}}} | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|location = [[東京都]][[板橋区]][[桜川 (板橋区)|桜川]]1-4-6 |位置={{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E|display=inline,title}} | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|deity = [[金山彦神|金山彦命、金山姫命]]、[[ヤマトタケル|倭健命]] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|type = |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = 桜川御嶽神社、上板橋御嶽神社 |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = }} '''御嶽神社'''（みたけじんじゃ）は、[[東京都]][[板橋区]][[桜川 (板橋区)|桜川]]にある[[神社]]。地名を冠して'''桜川御嶽神社'''（さくらがわ みたけじんじゃ）、'''上板橋御嶽神社'''（かみいたばし みたけじんじゃ）とも称する。 == 概要 == 創建年代は不明である。当地には昔からある神社は無く、[[15世紀]]中期の[[太田道灌]]の[[江戸城]]築城の際に、立ち退きを命じられて当地に移転してきた宝田家の私的な[[稲荷神社]]しかなかった。そのため誰もが気兼ねなく参拝できる神社を設置すべく、[[武蔵御嶽神社]]か[[金櫻神社]]から[[分霊]]を勧請して創建したという板橋区教育委員会 編『いたばしの神社 (文化財シリーズ第36集)』板橋区教育委員会、1981年、89-90p。 当社には、毎年[[3月8日]]に[[ダイコン|大根]]で鶴亀の飾りを作って、山盛りの飯を供える「毘射祭」がある。 File:Mitake-jinja hall of worship 2022-11-13.jpg|拝殿 == 摂末社 == *稲荷神社 *神明社 == 氏子区域 == *[[桜川 (板橋区)|桜川]]1丁目の一部 *[[上板橋]]1～3丁目 == 交通アクセス == *[[上板橋駅]]より徒歩11分。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == *板橋区教育委員会 編『いたばしの神社 (文化財シリーズ第36集)』板橋区教育委員会、1981年 == 外部リンク == {{Commonscat|Mitake-jinja (Itabashi)}} * [https://www.city.itabashi.tokyo.jp/bunka/bunkazi/bunkazai/shozaichi/1004875.html 御嶽神社のご案内] - 板橋区 {{Pref-stub|pref=東京都}} {{buddhism-stub}} {{citation needed:みたけしんしや いたはしくさくらかわ}} [[Category:板橋区の神社]] [[Category:Ontake Shrines]] [[Category:mass imported shinto cult pages needing dummy edit for attribution and to be reviewed if a redirect and jawiki link reviewing]][[ja:御嶽神社 (板橋区)]][[Category:qq]][[Category:Pages needing attribution]]

{{神社 |名称 = 御嶽神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|image=[[File:Mitake-jinja entrance 2022-11-13.jpg|250px]]
鳥居と拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E}}}} | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|location = [[東京都]][[板橋区]][[桜川 (板橋区)|桜川]]1-4-6 |位置={{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E|display=inline,title}} | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|deity = [[金山彦神|金山彦命、金山姫命]]、[[ヤマトタケル|倭健命]] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|type = |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = 桜川御嶽神社、上板橋御嶽神社 |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = }} '''御嶽神社'''（みたけじんじゃ）は、[[東京都]][[板橋区]][[桜川 (板橋区)|桜川]]にある[[神社]]。地名を冠して'''桜川御嶽神社'''（さくらがわ みたけじんじゃ）、'''上板橋御嶽神社'''（かみいたばし みたけじんじゃ）とも称する。 == Overview == 創建年代は不明である。当地には昔からある神社は無く、[[15世紀]]中期の[[太田道灌]]の[[江戸城]]築城の際に、立ち退きを命じられて当地に移転してきた宝田家の私的な[[稲荷神社]]しかなかった。そのため誰もが気兼ねなく参拝できる神社を設置すべく、[[武蔵御嶽神社]]か[[金櫻神社]]から[[分霊]]を勧請して創建したという板橋区教育委員会 編『いたばしの神社 (文化財シリーズ第36集)』板橋区教育委員会、1981年、89-90p。 当社には、毎年[[3月8日]]に[[ダイコン|大根]]で鶴亀の飾りを作って、山盛りの飯を供える「毘射祭」がある。 File:Mitake-jinja hall of worship 2022-11-13.jpg|拝殿 == 摂末社 == *稲荷神社 *神明社 == 氏子区域 == *[[桜川 (板橋区)|桜川]]1丁目の一部 *[[上板橋]]1～3丁目 == 交通アクセス == *[[上板橋駅]]より徒歩11分。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == *板橋区教育委員会 編『いたばしの神社 (文化財シリーズ第36集)』板橋区教育委員会、1981年 == 外部リンク == {{Commonscat|Mitake-jinja (Itabashi)}} * [https://www.city.itabashi.tokyo.jp/bunka/bunkazi/bunkazai/shozaichi/1004875.html 御嶽神社のご案内] - 板橋区 {{Pref-stub|pref=東京都}} {{buddhism-stub}} {{citation needed|みたけしんしや いたはしくさくらかわ}} [[Category:板橋区の神社]] [[Category:Ontake Shrines]] [[Category:Untranslated pages]] [[Category:mass imported shinto cult pages needing dummy edit for attribution and to be reviewed if a redirect and jawiki link reviewing]][[ja:御嶽神社 (板橋区)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:getting the categories and imported pages jawiki linked]][[ja:御嶽神社 (板橋区)]][[Category:qq]]

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E}}}} | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|location = [[東京都]][[板橋区]][[桜川 (板橋区)|桜川]]1-4-6 |位置={{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E|display=inline,title}} | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|deity = [[金山彦神|金山彦命、金山姫命]]、[[ヤマトタケル|倭健命]] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|type = |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = 桜川御嶽神社、上板橋御嶽神社 |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = }} '''御嶽神社'''（みたけじんじゃ）は、[[東京都]][[板橋区]][[桜川 (板橋区)|桜川]]にある[[神社]]。地名を冠して'''桜川御嶽神社'''（さくらがわ みたけじんじゃ）、'''上板橋御嶽神社'''（かみいたばし みたけじんじゃ）とも称する。 == Overview == 創建年代は不明である。当地には昔からある神社は無く、[[15世紀]]中期の[[太田道灌]]の[[江戸城]]築城の際に、立ち退きを命じられて当地に移転してきた宝田家の私的な[[稲荷神社]]しかなかった。そのため誰もが気兼ねなく参拝できる神社を設置すべく、[[武蔵御嶽神社]]か[[金櫻神社]]から[[分霊]]を勧請して創建したという板橋区教育委員会 編『いたばしの神社 (文化財シリーズ第36集)』板橋区教育委員会、1981年、89-90p。 当社には、毎年[[3月8日]]に[[ダイコン|大根]]で鶴亀の飾りを作って、山盛りの飯を供える「毘射祭」がある。 File:Mitake-jinja hall of worship 2022-11-13.jpg|拝殿 == 摂末社 == *稲荷神社 *神明社 == 氏子区域 == *[[桜川 (板橋区)|桜川]]1丁目の一部 *[[上板橋]]1～3丁目 == 交通アクセス == *[[上板橋駅]]より徒歩11分。 == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == *板橋区教育委員会 編『いたばしの神社 (文化財シリーズ第36集)』板橋区教育委員会、1981年 == External Links == {{Commonscat|Mitake-jinja (Itabashi)}} * [https://www.city.itabashi.tokyo.jp/bunka/bunkazi/bunkazai/shozaichi/1004875.html 御嶽神社のご案内] - 板橋区 {{Pref-stub|pref=東京都}} {{buddhism-stub}} {{citation needed|みたけしんしや いたはしくさくらかわ}} [[Category:板橋区の神社]] [[Category:Ontake Shrines]] [[Category:Old untranslated pages]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Ontake Shrine (板橋区)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:mass imported shinto cult pages needing dummy edit for attribution and to be reviewed if a redirect and jawiki link reviewing]][[ja:御嶽神社 (板橋区)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:getting the categories and imported pages jawiki linked]][[ja:御嶽神社 (板橋区)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Ontake Shrine (板橋区)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Ontake Shrine (板橋区)]][[Category:qq]]

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E}}}} | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|location = [[東京都]][[板橋区]][[桜川 (板橋区)|桜川]]1-4-6 |位置={{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E|display=inline,title}} | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|deity = [[金山彦神|金山彦命、金山姫命]]、[[ヤマトタケル|倭健命]] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|type = |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = 桜川御嶽神社、上板橋御嶽神社 |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = }} '''御嶽神社'''（みたけじんじゃ）は、[[東京都]][[板橋区]][[桜川 (板橋区)|桜川]]にある[[神社]]。地名を冠して'''桜川御嶽神社'''（さくらがわ みたけじんじゃ）、'''上板橋御嶽神社'''（かみいたばし みたけじんじゃ）とも称する。 == Overview == 創建年代は不明である。当地には昔からある神社は無く、[[15世紀]]中期の[[太田道灌]]の[[江戸城]]築城の際に、立ち退きを命じられて当地に移転してきた宝田家の私的な[[稲荷神社]]しかなかった。そのため誰もが気兼ねなく参拝できる神社を設置すべく、{{ill|8=ja|9=武蔵御嶽神社|Musashi-Mitake Shrine}}か[[金櫻神社]]から[[分霊]]を勧請して創建したという板橋区教育委員会 編『いたばしの神社 (文化財シリーズ第36集)』板橋区教育委員会、1981年、89-90p。 当社には、毎年[[3月8日]]に[[ダイコン|大根]]で鶴亀の飾りを作って、山盛りの飯を供える「毘射祭」がある。 File:Mitake-jinja hall of worship 2022-11-13.jpg|拝殿 == 摂末社 == *稲荷神社 *神明社 == 氏子区域 == *[[桜川 (板橋区)|桜川]]1丁目の一部 *[[上板橋]]1～3丁目 == 交通アクセス == *[[上板橋駅]]より徒歩11分。 == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == *板橋区教育委員会 編『いたばしの神社 (文化財シリーズ第36集)』板橋区教育委員会、1981年 == External Links == {{Commonscat|Mitake-jinja (Itabashi)}} * [https://www.city.itabashi.tokyo.jp/bunka/bunkazi/bunkazai/shozaichi/1004875.html 御嶽神社のご案内] - 板橋区 {{Pref-stub|pref=東京都}} {{buddhism-stub}} {{citation needed|みたけしんしや いたはしくさくらかわ}} [[Category:板橋区の神社]] [[Category:Ontake Shrines]] [[Category:Pages to be translated]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Ontake Shrine (板橋区)]][[Category:11]] [[Category:mass imported shinto cult pages needing dummy edit for attribution and to be reviewed if a redirect and jawiki link reviewing]][[ja:御嶽神社 (板橋区)]][[Category:11]] [[ja:御嶽神社 (板橋区)]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Ontake Shrine (板橋区)]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Ontake Shrine (板橋区)]][[Category:11]]

{{Infobox Shrine |name = Mitake Shrine |religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image=[[File:Mitake-jinja entrance 2022-11-13.jpg|250px]]
Torii and worship hall (haiden)
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E}}}} |location = [[Tokyo]][[Itabashi|Itabashi Ward]][[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]] 1-4-6 |coordinates={{coord|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E|display=inline,title}} |deity = {{ill|Kanayama-hiko|ja|金山彦神|lt=Kanayama-hiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=金山彦命}}, {{ill|Kanayama-hime|ja|金山姫神|lt=Kanayama-hime no Mikoto|lt_ja=金山姫命}}, {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|lt=Yamato Takeru no Mikoto|lt_ja=倭健命}} |type = |established = Unknown |honden = |other_names = Sakuragawa Mitake Shrine, Kami-Itabashi Mitake Shrine |festivals = |rituals = }} '''Mitake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Mitake Jinja) is a [[Shinto shrine]] located in [[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]], [[Itabashi|Itabashi Ward]], [[Tokyo]]. It is also known by the locality names '''Sakuragawa Mitake Shrine''' and '''Kami-Itabashi Mitake Shrine'''. == Overview == The exact founding date is unknown. Historically, there were no public shrines in the area, only a private {{ill|Inari Shrine|ja|稲荷神社}} belonging to the Takarada family, who relocated here after being forced to move during the construction of {{ill|Edo Castle|ja|江戸城}} by {{ill|Ōta Dōkan|ja|太田道灌}} in the mid-[[15th century]]. Therefore, a public shrine was established by inviting a divided spirit (bunrei) either from {{ill|Musashi-Mitake Shrine|ja|武蔵御嶽神社}} or {{ill|Kana Sakura Shrine|ja|金櫻神社}}.Itabashi Ward Board of Education, "Itabashi no Jinja (Cultural Properties Series Vol.36)," Itabashi Ward Board of Education, 1981, pp. 89-90. Every year on [[March 8]], a ritual called the "Bisha Festival" is held, in which decorations of cranes and turtles made of [[Daikon]] radishes are offered with heaps of rice. File:Mitake-jinja hall of worship 2022-11-13.jpg|Haiden (worship hall) == Subordinate Shrines == * Inari Shrine * Shinmei Shrine == Ujiko (Parishioner) Area == * Part of [[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]] 1-chome * [[Kami-Itabashi]] 1-3 chome == Access == * 11-minute walk from [[Kami-Itabashi Station]]. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * Itabashi Ward Board of Education, "Itabashi no Jinja (Cultural Properties Series Vol.36)," Itabashi Ward Board of Education, 1981. == External Links == {{Commonscat|Mitake-jinja (Itabashi)}} * [https://www.city.itabashi.tokyo.jp/bunka/bunkazi/bunkazai/shozaichi/1004875.html Information on Mitake Shrine] - Itabashi Ward {{Pref-stub|pref=Tokyo}} {{buddhism-stub}} {{citation needed|mitakejinja itabashi sakuragawa}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Itabashi Ward]] [[Category:Ontake Shrines]] [[Category:Translated pages]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Mass imported Shinto cult pages needing dummy edit for attribution and to be reviewed if a redirect and jawiki link reviewing]] [[ja:御嶽神社 (板橋区)]]

{{Infobox Shrine |name = Mitake Shrine |religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image=[[File:Mitake-jinja entrance 2022-11-13.jpg|250px]]
Torii and worship hall (haiden)
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E}}}} |location = [[Tokyo]][[Itabashi|Itabashi Ward]][[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]] 1-4-6 |coordinates={{coord|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E|display=inline,title}} |deity = {{ill|Kanayama-hiko|ja|金山彦神|lt=Kanayama-hiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=金山彦命}}, {{ill|Kanayama-hime|ja|金山姫神|lt=Kanayama-hime no Mikoto|lt_ja=金山姫命}}, {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|lt=Yamato Takeru no Mikoto|lt_ja=倭健命}} |type = |established = Unknown |honden = |other_names = Sakuragawa Mitake Shrine, Kami-Itabashi Mitake Shrine |festivals = |rituals = }} '''Mitake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Mitake Jinja) is a [[Shinto shrine]] located in [[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]], [[Itabashi|Itabashi Ward]], [[Tokyo]]. It is also known by the locality names '''Sakuragawa Mitake Shrine''' and '''Kami-Itabashi Mitake Shrine'''. == Overview == The exact founding date is unknown. Historically, there were no public shrines in the area, only a private {{ill|Inari Shrine|ja|稲荷神社}} belonging to the Takarada family, who relocated here after being forced to move during the construction of {{ill|Edo Castle|ja|江戸城}} by {{ill|Ōta Dōkan|ja|太田道灌}} in the mid-[[15th century]]. Therefore, a public shrine was established by inviting a divided spirit (bunrei) either from {{ill|Musashi-Mitake Shrine|ja|武蔵御嶽神社}} or {{ill|Kana Sakura Shrine|ja|金櫻神社}}.Itabashi Ward Board of Education, "Itabashi no Jinja (Cultural Properties Series Vol.36)," Itabashi Ward Board of Education, 1981, pp. 89-90. Every year on [[March 8]], a ritual called the "Bisha Festival" is held, in which decorations of cranes and turtles made of [[Daikon]] radishes are offered with heaps of rice. File:Mitake-jinja hall of worship 2022-11-13.jpg|Haiden (worship hall) == Subordinate Shrines == * Inari Shrine * Shinmei Shrine == Ujiko (Parishioner) Area == * Part of [[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]] 1-chome * [[Kami-Itabashi]] 1-3 chome == Access == * 11-minute walk from [[Kami-Itabashi Station]]. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * Itabashi Ward Board of Education, "Itabashi no Jinja (Cultural Properties Series Vol.36)," Itabashi Ward Board of Education, 1981. == External Links == {{Commonscat|Mitake-jinja (Itabashi)}} * [https://www.city.itabashi.tokyo.jp/bunka/bunkazi/bunkazai/shozaichi/1004875.html Information on Mitake Shrine] - Itabashi Ward {{Pref-stub|pref=Tokyo}} {{buddhism-stub}} {{citation needed|mitakejinja itabashi sakuragawa}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Itabashi Ward]] [[Category:Ontake Shrines]] [[Category:Translated pages]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Mass imported Shinto cult pages needing dummy edit for attribution and to be reviewed if a redirect and jawiki link reviewing]] [[ja:御嶽神社 (板橋区)]]

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E}}}} |location = [[Tokyo]][[Itabashi|Itabashi Ward]][[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]] 1-4-6 |coordinates={{coord|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E|display=inline,title}} |deity = {{ill|Kanayama-hiko|ja|金山彦神|lt=Kanayama-hiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=金山彦命|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kanayama-hime|ja|金山姫神|lt=Kanayama-hime no Mikoto|lt_ja=金山姫命|12=draft}}, {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|lt=Yamato Takeru no Mikoto|lt_ja=倭健命|12=draft}} |type = |established = Unknown |honden = |other_names = Sakuragawa Mitake Shrine, Kami-Itabashi Mitake Shrine |festivals = |rituals = }} '''Mitake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Mitake Jinja) is a [[Shinto shrine]] located in [[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]], [[Itabashi|Itabashi Ward]], [[Tokyo]]. It is also known by the locality names '''Sakuragawa Mitake Shrine''' and '''Kami-Itabashi Mitake Shrine'''. == Overview == The exact founding date is unknown. Historically, there were no public shrines in the area, only a private {{ill|Inari Shrine|ja|稲荷神社|12=draft}} belonging to the Takarada family, who relocated here after being forced to move during the construction of {{ill|Edo Castle|ja|江戸城|12=draft}} by {{ill|Ōta Dōkan|ja|太田道灌|12=draft}} in the mid-[[15th century]]. Therefore, a public shrine was established by inviting a divided spirit (bunrei) either from {{ill|Musashi-Mitake Shrine|ja|武蔵御嶽神社|12=draft}} or {{ill|Kana Sakura Shrine|ja|金櫻神社|12=draft}}.Itabashi Ward Board of Education, "Itabashi no Jinja (Cultural Properties Series Vol.36)," Itabashi Ward Board of Education, 1981, pp. 89-90. Every year on [[March 8]], a ritual called the "Bisha Festival" is held, in which decorations of cranes and turtles made of [[Daikon]] radishes are offered with heaps of rice. {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E}}}} |location = [[Tokyo]][[Itabashi|Itabashi Ward]][[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]] 1-4-6 |coordinates={{coord|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E|display=inline,title}} |deity = {{ill|Kanayama-hiko|ja|金山彦神|lt=Kanayama-hiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=金山彦命|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kanayama-hime|ja|金山姫神|lt=Kanayama-hime no Mikoto|lt_ja=金山姫命|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|lt=Yamato Takeru no Mikoto|lt_ja=倭健命|12=draft|12=draft}} |type = |established = Unknown |honden = |other_names = Sakuragawa Mitake Shrine, Kami-Itabashi Mitake Shrine |festivals = |rituals = }} '''Mitake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Mitake Jinja) is a [[Shinto shrine]] located in [[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]], [[Itabashi|Itabashi Ward]], [[Tokyo]]. It is also known by the locality names '''Sakuragawa Mitake Shrine''' and '''Kami-Itabashi Mitake Shrine'''. == Overview == The exact founding date is unknown. Historically, there were no public shrines in the area, only a private {{ill|Inari Shrine|ja|稲荷神社|12=draft|12=draft}} belonging to the Takarada family, who relocated here after being forced to move during the construction of {{ill|Edo Castle|ja|江戸城|12=draft|12=draft}} by {{ill|Ōta Dōkan|ja|太田道灌|12=draft|12=draft}} in the mid-[[15th century]]. Therefore, a public shrine was established by inviting a divided spirit (bunrei) either from {{ill|Musashi-Mitake Shrine|ja|武蔵御嶽神社|12=draft|12=draft}} or {{ill|Kana Sakura Shrine|ja|金櫻神社|12=draft|12=draft}}.Itabashi Ward Board of Education, "Itabashi no Jinja (Cultural Properties Series Vol.36)," Itabashi Ward Board of Education, 1981, pp. 89-90. Every year on [[March 8]], a ritual called the "Bisha Festival" is held, in which decorations of cranes and turtles made of [[Daikon]] radishes are offered with heaps of rice. File:Mitake-jinja hall of worship 2022-11-13.jpg|Haiden (worship hall) == Subordinate Shrines == * Inari Shrine * Shinmei Shrine == Ujiko (Parishioner) Area == * Part of [[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]] 1-chome * [[Kami-Itabashi]] 1-3 chome == Access == * 11-minute walk from [[Kami-Itabashi Station]]. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * Itabashi Ward Board of Education, "Itabashi no Jinja (Cultural Properties Series Vol.36)," Itabashi Ward Board of Education, 1981. == External Links == {{Commonscat|Mitake-jinja (Itabashi)}} * [https://www.city.itabashi.tokyo.jp/bunka/bunkazi/bunkazai/shozaichi/1004875.html Information on Mitake Shrine] - Itabashi Ward {{Pref-stub|pref=Tokyo}} {{buddhism-stub}} {{citation needed|mitakejinja itabashi sakuragawa}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Pages without meta categories]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Mitake Shrine (Sakuragawa)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Mitake Shrine (Sakuragawa)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Itabashi Ward]] [[Category:Ontake Shrines]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Mass imported Shinto cult pages needing dummy edit for attribution and to be reviewed if a redirect and jawiki link reviewing]] }} [[ja:御嶽神社 (板橋区)]] [[sn:Mitake Shrine (Sakuragawa)]]

revision.comment: 6 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:御嶽神社 (板橋区) up to rev 101958231
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 御嶽神社 |画像=[[File:Mitake-jinja entrance 2022-11-13.jpg|250px]]
鳥居と拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E}}}} |所在地 = [[東京都]][[板橋区]][[桜川 (板橋区)|桜川]]1-4-6 |位置={{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[金山彦神|金山彦命、金山姫命]]、[[ヤマトタケル|倭健命]] |社格 = |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = 桜川御嶽神社、上板橋御嶽神社 |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''御嶽神社'''（みたけじんじゃ）は、[[東京都]][[板橋区]][[桜川 (板橋区)|桜川]]にある[[神社]]。地名を冠して'''桜川御嶽神社'''（さくらがわ みたけじんじゃ）、'''上板橋御嶽神社'''（かみいたばし みたけじんじゃ）とも称する。 == 概要 == 創建年代は不明である。当地には昔からある神社は無く、[[15世紀]]中期の[[太田道灌]]の[[江戸城]]築城の際に、立ち退きを命じられて当地に移転してきた宝田家の私的な[[稲荷神社]]しかなかった。そのため誰もが気兼ねなく参拝できる神社を設置すべく、[[武蔵御嶽神社]]か[[金櫻神社]]から[[分霊]]を勧請して創建したという板橋区教育委員会 編『いたばしの神社 (文化財シリーズ第36集)』板橋区教育委員会、1981年、89-90p。 当社には、毎年[[3月8日]]に[[ダイコン|大根]]で鶴亀の飾りを作って、山盛りの飯を供える「毘射祭」がある。 File:Mitake-jinja hall of worship 2022-11-13.jpg|拝殿 == 摂末社 == *稲荷神社 *神明社 == 氏子区域 == *[[桜川 (板橋区)|桜川]]1丁目の一部 *[[上板橋]]1～3丁目 == 交通アクセス == *[[上板橋駅]]より徒歩11分。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == *板橋区教育委員会 編『いたばしの神社 (文化財シリーズ第36集)』板橋区教育委員会、1981年 == 外部リンク == {{Commonscat|Mitake-jinja (Itabashi)}} * [https://www.city.itabashi.tokyo.jp/bunka/bunkazi/bunkazai/shozaichi/1004875.html 御嶽神社のご案内] - 板橋区 {{Pref-stub|pref=東京都}} {{buddhism-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みたけしんしや いたはしくさくらかわ}} [[Category:板橋区の神社]] [[Category:御嶽神社]]

{{Infobox Shrine |name = Mitake Shrine |religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image=[[File:Mitake-jinja entrance 2022-11-13.jpg|250px]]
Torii and worship hall (haiden)
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E}}}} |location = [[Tokyo]][[Itabashi|Itabashi Ward]][[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]] 1-4-6 |coordinates={{coord|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E|display=inline,title}} |deity = {{ill|Kanayama-hiko|ja|金山彦神|lt=Kanayama-hiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=金山彦命|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Kanayama-hime|ja|金山姫神|lt=Kanayama-hime no Mikoto|lt_ja=金山姫命|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|lt=Yamato Takeru no Mikoto|lt_ja=倭健命|qq=draft}} |type = |established = Unknown |honden = |other_names = Sakuragawa Mitake Shrine, Kami-Itabashi Mitake Shrine |festivals = |rituals = }} '''Mitake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Mitake Jinja) is a [[Shinto shrine]] located in [[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]], [[Itabashi|Itabashi Ward]], [[Tokyo]]. It is also known by the locality names '''Sakuragawa Mitake Shrine''' and '''Kami-Itabashi Mitake Shrine'''. == Overview == The exact founding date is unknown. Historically, there were no public shrines in the area, only a private {{ill|Inari Shrine|ja|稲荷神社|qq=draft}} belonging to the Takarada family, who relocated here after being forced to move during the construction of {{ill|Edo Castle|ja|江戸城|qq=draft}} by {{ill|Ōta Dōkan|ja|太田道灌|qq=draft}} in the mid-[[15th century]]. Therefore, a public shrine was established by inviting a divided spirit (bunrei) either from {{ill|Musashi-Mitake Shrine|ja|武蔵御嶽神社|qq=draft}} or {{ill|Kana Sakura Shrine|ja|金櫻神社|qq=draft}}.Itabashi Ward Board of Education, "Itabashi no Jinja (Cultural Properties Series Vol.36)," Itabashi Ward Board of Education, 1981, pp. 89-90. Every year on [[March 8]], a ritual called the "Bisha Festival" is held, in which decorations of cranes and turtles made of [[Daikon]] radishes are offered with heaps of rice. {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E}}}} |location = [[Tokyo]][[Itabashi|Itabashi Ward]][[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]] 1-4-6 |coordinates={{coord|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E|display=inline,title}} |deity = {{ill|Kanayama-hiko|ja|金山彦神|lt=Kanayama-hiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=金山彦命|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Kanayama-hime|ja|金山姫神|lt=Kanayama-hime no Mikoto|lt_ja=金山姫命|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|lt=Yamato Takeru no Mikoto|lt_ja=倭健命|qq=draft}} |type = |established = Unknown |honden = |other_names = Sakuragawa Mitake Shrine, Kami-Itabashi Mitake Shrine |festivals = |rituals = }} '''Mitake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Mitake Jinja) is a [[Shinto shrine]] located in [[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]], [[Itabashi|Itabashi Ward]], [[Tokyo]]. It is also known by the locality names '''Sakuragawa Mitake Shrine''' and '''Kami-Itabashi Mitake Shrine'''. == Overview == The exact founding date is unknown. Historically, there were no public shrines in the area, only a private {{ill|Inari Shrine|ja|稲荷神社|qq=draft}} belonging to the Takarada family, who relocated here after being forced to move during the construction of {{ill|Edo Castle|ja|江戸城|qq=draft}} by {{ill|Ōta Dōkan|ja|太田道灌|qq=draft}} in the mid-[[15th century]]. Therefore, a public shrine was established by inviting a divided spirit (bunrei) either from {{ill|Musashi-Mitake Shrine|ja|武蔵御嶽神社|qq=draft}} or {{ill|Kana Sakura Shrine|ja|金櫻神社|qq=draft}}.Itabashi Ward Board of Education, "Itabashi no Jinja (Cultural Properties Series Vol.36)," Itabashi Ward Board of Education, 1981, pp. 89-90. Every year on [[March 8]], a ritual called the "Bisha Festival" is held, in which decorations of cranes and turtles made of [[Daikon]] radishes are offered with heaps of rice. {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E}}}} |location = [[Tokyo]][[Itabashi|Itabashi Ward]][[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]] 1-4-6 |coordinates={{coord|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E|display=inline,title}} |deity = {{ill|Kanayama-hiko|ja|金山彦神|lt=Kanayama-hiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=金山彦命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanayama-hiko|qq=}}, {{ill|Kanayama-hime|ja|金山姫神|lt=Kanayama-hime no Mikoto|lt_ja=金山姫命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanayama-hime|qq=}}, [[:en:Yamato Takeru|Yamato Takeru no Mikoto]] |type = |established = Unknown |honden = |other_names = Sakuragawa Mitake Shrine, Kami-Itabashi Mitake Shrine |festivals = |rituals = }} '''Mitake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Mitake Jinja) is a [[Shinto shrine]] located in [[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]], [[Itabashi|Itabashi Ward]], [[Tokyo]]. It is also known by the locality names '''Sakuragawa Mitake Shrine''' and '''Kami-Itabashi Mitake Shrine'''. == Overview == The exact founding date is unknown. Historically, there were no public shrines in the area, only a private [[:en:Inari shrine|Inari Shrine]] belonging to the Takarada family, who relocated here after being forced to move during the construction of [[:en:Edo Castle|Edo Castle]] by [[:en:Ōta Dōkan|Ōta Dōkan]] in the mid-[[15th century]]. Therefore, a public shrine was established by inviting a divided spirit (bunrei) either from {{ill|Musashi-Mitake Shrine|ja|武蔵御嶽神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Musashi-Mitake Shrine|qq=}} or {{ill|Kana Sakura Shrine|ja|金櫻神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kana Sakura Shrine|qq=}}.Itabashi Ward Board of Education, "Itabashi no Jinja (Cultural Properties Series Vol.36)," Itabashi Ward Board of Education, 1981, pp. 89-90. Every year on [[March 8]], a ritual called the "Bisha Festival" is held, in which decorations of cranes and turtles made of [[Daikon]] radishes are offered with heaps of rice. File:Mitake-jinja hall of worship 2022-11-13.jpg|Haiden (worship hall) == Subordinate Shrines == * Inari Shrine * Shinmei Shrine == Ujiko (Parishioner) Area == * Part of [[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]] 1-chome * [[Kami-Itabashi]] 1-3 chome == Access == * 11-minute walk from [[Kami-Itabashi Station]]. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * Itabashi Ward Board of Education, "Itabashi no Jinja (Cultural Properties Series Vol.36)," Itabashi Ward Board of Education, 1981. == External Links == {{Commonscat|Mitake-jinja (Itabashi)}} * [https://www.city.itabashi.tokyo.jp/bunka/bunkazi/bunkazai/shozaichi/1004875.html Information on Mitake Shrine] - Itabashi Ward {{Pref-stub|pref=Tokyo}} {{buddhism-stub}} [[Category:completion tier 1]] [[Category:Orphaned translated pages]] {{translated page|ja|御嶽神社 (板橋区)|version=101958231|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Itabashi Ward]] [[Category:Ontake Shrines]] }} [[sn:Mitake Shrine (Sakuragawa)]] [[ja:御嶽神社 (板橋区)]]

Historically, there were no public shrines in the area, only a private [[:en:Inari shrine|Inari Shrine]] belonging to the Takarada family, who relocated here after being forced to move during the construction of [[:en:Edo Castle|Edo Castle]] by [[:en:Ōta Dōkan|Ōta Dōkan]] in the mid-[[:en:15th century|15th century]]. Therefore, a public shrine was established by inviting a divided spirit (bunrei) either from {{ill|Musashi-Mitake Shrine|ja|武蔵御嶽神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Musashi-Mitake Shrine|qq=}} or {{ill|Kana Sakura Shrine|ja|金櫻神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kana Sakura Shrine|qq=|1=Kanazakura Shrine, Kofu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11647310}}.Itabashi Ward Board of Education, "Itabashi no Jinja (Cultural Properties Series Vol.36)," Itabashi Ward Board of Education, 1981, pp. 89-90. Every year on [[:en:March 8|March 8]], a ritual called the "Bisha Festival" is held, in which decorations of cranes and turtles made of [[:en:Daikon|Daikon]] radishes are offered with heaps of rice. Historically, there were no public shrines in the area, only a private [[:en:Inari shrine|Inari Shrine]] belonging to the Takarada family, who relocated here after being forced to move during the construction of [[:en:Edo Castle|Edo Castle]] by [[:en:Ōta Dōkan|Ōta Dōkan]] in the mid-[[:en:15th century|15th century]]. Therefore, a public shrine was established by inviting a divided spirit (bunrei) either from {{ill|Musashi-Mitake Shrine|ja|武蔵御嶽神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Musashi-Mitake Shrine|qq=}} or {{ill|Kana Sakura Shrine|ja|金櫻神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kana Sakura Shrine|qq=|1=Kanazakura Shrine, Kofu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11647310}}.Itabashi Ward Board of Education, "Itabashi no Jinja (Cultural Properties Series Vol.36)," Itabashi Ward Board of Education, 1981, pp. 89-90. Every year on [[:en:March 8|March 8]], a ritual called the "Bisha Festival" is held, in which decorations of cranes and turtles made of [[:en:Daikon|Daikon]] radishes are offered with heaps of rice. File:Mitake-jinja hall of worship 2022-11-13.jpg|Haiden (worship hall) == Subordinate Shrines == * Inari Shrine * Shinmei Shrine == Ujiko (Parishioner) Area == * Part of [[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]] 1-chome * [[Kami-Itabashi]] 1-3 chome == Access == * 11-minute walk from [[:en:Kami-Itabashi Station|Kami-Itabashi Station]]. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * Itabashi Ward Board of Education, "Itabashi no Jinja (Cultural Properties Series Vol.36)," Itabashi Ward Board of Education, 1981. == External Links == {{Commonscat|Mitake-jinja (Itabashi)}} * [https://www.city.itabashi.tokyo.jp/bunka/bunkazi/bunkazai/shozaichi/1004875.html Information on Mitake Shrine] - Itabashi Ward {{Pref-stub|pref=Tokyo}} {{buddhism-stub}} [[Category:completion tier 1]] {{translated page|ja|御嶽神社 (板橋区)|version=101958231|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Ontake Shrines]] }} [[ja:御嶽神社 (板橋区)]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Itabashi, Tokyo]] {{wikidata link|Q97613665}}

Historically, there were no public shrines in the area, only a private [[:en:Inari shrine|Inari Shrine]] belonging to the Takarada family, who relocated here after being forced to move during the construction of [[:en:Edo Castle|Edo Castle]] by [[:en:Ōta Dōkan|Ōta Dōkan]] in the mid-[[:en:15th century|15th century]]. Therefore, a public shrine was established by inviting a divided spirit (bunrei) either from {{ill|Musashi-Mitake Shrine|ja|武蔵御嶽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Musashi-Mitake Shrine|qq=}} or {{ill|Kana Sakura Shrine|ja|金櫻神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kana Sakura Shrine|1=Kanazakura Shrine, Kofu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11647310}}.Itabashi Ward Board of Education, "Itabashi no Jinja (Cultural Properties Series Vol.36)," Itabashi Ward Board of Education, 1981, pp. 89-90. Every year on [[:en:March 8|March 8]], a ritual called the "Bisha Festival" is held, in which decorations of cranes and turtles made of [[:en:Daikon|Daikon]] radishes are offered with heaps of rice. File:Mitake-jinja hall of worship 2022-11-13.jpg|Haiden (worship hall) == Subordinate Shrines == * Inari Shrine * Shinmei Shrine == Ujiko (Parishioner) Area == * Part of [[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]] 1-chome * [[Kami-Itabashi]] 1-3 chome == Access == * 11-minute walk from [[:en:Kami-Itabashi Station|Kami-Itabashi Station]]. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * Itabashi Ward Board of Education, "Itabashi no Jinja (Cultural Properties Series Vol.36)," Itabashi Ward Board of Education, 1981. == External Links == {{Commonscat|Mitake-jinja (Itabashi)}} * [https://www.city.itabashi.tokyo.jp/bunka/bunkazi/bunkazai/shozaichi/1004875.html Information on Mitake Shrine] - Itabashi Ward {{Pref-stub|pref=Tokyo}} {{buddhism-stub}} [[Category:completion tier 1]] {{translated page|ja|御嶽神社 (板橋区)|version=101958231|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Ontake Shrines]] }} [[ja:御嶽神社 (板橋区)]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Itabashi, Tokyo]] {{wikidata link|Q97613665}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] {{wikidata link|Q97613665}} [[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E}}}} |location = [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]][[:en:Itabashi|Itabashi Ward]][[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]] 1-4-6 |coordinates={{coord|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E|display=inline,title}} |deity = {{ill|Kanayama-hiko|ja|金山彦神|lt=Kanayama-hiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=金山彦命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanayama-hiko|1=Kanayamahiko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4387856}}, {{ill|Kanayama-hime|ja|金山姫神|lt=Kanayama-hime no Mikoto|lt_ja=金山姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanayama-hime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 金山彦神|1=Kanayamahiko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4387856}}, [[:en:Yamato Takeru|Yamato Takeru no Mikoto]] |type = |established = Unknown |honden = |other_names = Sakuragawa Mitake Shrine, Kami-Itabashi Mitake Shrine |festivals = |rituals = }} '''Mitake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Mitake Jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]], [[:en:Itabashi|Itabashi Ward]], [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]]. It is also known by the locality names '''Sakuragawa Mitake Shrine''' and '''Kami-Itabashi Mitake Shrine'''. == Overview == The exact founding date is unknown. Historically, there were no public shrines in the area, only a private [[:en:Inari shrine|Inari Shrine]] belonging to the Takarada family, who relocated here after being forced to move during the construction of [[:en:Edo Castle|Edo Castle]] by [[:en:Ōta Dōkan|Ōta Dōkan]] in the mid-[[:en:15th century|15th century]]. Therefore, a public shrine was established by inviting a divided spirit (bunrei) either from {{ill|Musashi-Mitake Shrine|ja|武蔵御嶽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Musashi-Mitake Shrine|qq=}} or {{ill|Kana Sakura Shrine|ja|金櫻神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kana Sakura Shrine|1=Kanazakura Shrine, Kofu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11647310}}.Itabashi Ward Board of Education, "Itabashi no Jinja (Cultural Properties Series Vol.36)," Itabashi Ward Board of Education, 1981, pp. 89-90. Every year on [[:en:March 8|March 8]], a ritual called the "Bisha Festival" is held, in which decorations of cranes and turtles made of [[:en:Daikon|Daikon]] radishes are offered with heaps of rice. [[ja:御嶽神社 (板橋区)]] {{Infobox religious building|image=File:Mitake-jinja entrance 2022-11-13.jpg|prefecture={{ill|Itabashi-ku|WD=Q232635}}|coordinates={{Coord|35.757428|N|139.674698|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q97613665]] Wikidata name: Mitake-jinja [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox Shrine |name = Mitake Shrine |religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image=[[File:Mitake-jinja entrance 2022-11-13.jpg|250px]]
Torii and worship hall (haiden)
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E}}}} |location = [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]][[:en:Itabashi|Itabashi Ward]][[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]] 1-4-6 |coordinates={{coord|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E|display=inline,title}} |deity = {{ill|Kanayama-hiko|ja|金山彦神|lt=Kanayama-hiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=金山彦命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanayama-hiko|1=Kanayamahiko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4387856}}, {{ill|Kanayama-hime|ja|金山姫神|lt=Kanayama-hime no Mikoto|lt_ja=金山姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanayama-hime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 金山彦神|1=Kanayamahiko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4387856}}, [[:en:Yamato Takeru|Yamato Takeru no Mikoto]] |type = |established = Unknown |honden = |other_names = Sakuragawa Mitake Shrine, Kami-Itabashi Mitake Shrine |festivals = |rituals = }} '''Mitake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Mitake Jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]], [[:en:Itabashi|Itabashi Ward]], [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]]. It is also known by the locality names '''Sakuragawa Mitake Shrine''' and '''Kami-Itabashi Mitake Shrine'''. == Overview == The exact founding date is unknown. Historically, there were no public shrines in the area, only a private [[:en:Inari shrine|Inari Shrine]] belonging to the Takarada family, who relocated here after being forced to move during the construction of [[:en:Edo Castle|Edo Castle]] by [[:en:Ōta Dōkan|Ōta Dōkan]] in the mid-[[:en:15th century|15th century]]. Therefore, a public shrine was established by inviting a divided spirit (bunrei) either from {{ill|Musashi-Mitake Shrine|ja|武蔵御嶽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Musashi-Mitake Shrine|qq=}} or {{ill|Kana Sakura Shrine|ja|金櫻神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kana Sakura Shrine|1=Kanazakura Shrine, Kofu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11647310}}.Itabashi Ward Board of Education, "Itabashi no Jinja (Cultural Properties Series Vol.36)," Itabashi Ward Board of Education, 1981, pp. 89-90. Every year on [[:en:March 8|March 8]], a ritual called the "Bisha Festival" is held, in which decorations of cranes and turtles made of [[:en:Daikon|Daikon]] radishes are offered with heaps of rice. File:Mitake-jinja hall of worship 2022-11-13.jpg|Haiden (worship hall) == Subordinate Shrines == * Inari Shrine * Shinmei Shrine == Ujiko (Parishioner) Area == * Part of [[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]] 1-chome * [[Kami-Itabashi]] 1-3 chome == Access == * 11-minute walk from [[:en:Kami-Itabashi Station|Kami-Itabashi Station]]. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * Itabashi Ward Board of Education, "Itabashi no Jinja (Cultural Properties Series Vol.36)," Itabashi Ward Board of Education, 1981. == External Links == {{Commonscat|Mitake-jinja (Itabashi)}} * [https://www.city.itabashi.tokyo.jp/bunka/bunkazi/bunkazai/shozaichi/1004875.html Information on Mitake Shrine] - Itabashi Ward {{Pref-stub|pref=Tokyo}} {{buddhism-stub}} [[Category:completion tier 1]] {{translated page|ja|御嶽神社 (板橋区)|version=101958231|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Ontake Shrines]] }} [[ja:御嶽神社 (板橋区)]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Itabashi, Tokyo]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] {{wikidata link|Q97613665}}

File:Mitake-jinja hall of worship 2022-11-13.jpg|Haiden (worship hall) == Subordinate Shrines == * Inari Shrine * Shinmei Shrine == Ujiko (Parishioner) Area == * Part of [[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]] 1-chome * [[Kami-Itabashi]] 1-3 chome == Access == * 11-minute walk from [[:en:Kami-Itabashi Station|Kami-Itabashi Station]]. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * Itabashi Ward Board of Education, "Itabashi no Jinja (Cultural Properties Series Vol.36)," Itabashi Ward Board of Education, 1981. == External Links == {{Commonscat|Mitake-jinja (Itabashi)}} * [https://www.city.itabashi.tokyo.jp/bunka/bunkazi/bunkazai/shozaichi/1004875.html Information on Mitake Shrine] - Itabashi Ward {{Pref-stub|pref=Tokyo}} {{buddhism-stub}} [[Category:completion tier 1]] {{translated page|ja|御嶽神社 (板橋区)|version=101958231|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Ontake Shrines]] }} [[ja:御嶽神社 (板橋区)]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Itabashi, Tokyo]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] {{wikidata link|Q97613665}}

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E}}}} |location = [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]][[:en:Itabashi|Itabashi Ward]][[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]] 1-4-6 |coordinates={{coord|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E|display=inline,title}} |deity = {{ill|Kanayama-hiko|ja|金山彦神|lt=Kanayama-hiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=金山彦命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanayama-hiko|1=Kanayamahiko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4387856}}, {{ill|Kanayama-hime|ja|金山姫神|lt=Kanayama-hime no Mikoto|lt_ja=金山姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanayama-hime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 金山彦神|1=Kanayamahiko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4387856}}, [[:en:Yamato Takeru|Yamato Takeru no Mikoto]] |type = |established = Unknown |honden = |other_names = Sakuragawa Mitake Shrine, Kami-Itabashi Mitake Shrine |festivals = |rituals = }} '''Mitake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Mitake Jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]], [[:en:Itabashi|Itabashi Ward]], [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]]. It is also known by the locality names '''Sakuragawa Mitake Shrine''' and '''Kami-Itabashi Mitake Shrine'''. == Overview == The exact founding date is unknown. Historically, there were no public shrines in the area, only a private [[:en:Inari shrine|Inari Shrine]] belonging to the Takarada family, who relocated here after being forced to move during the construction of [[:en:Edo Castle|Edo Castle]] by [[:en:Ōta Dōkan|Ōta Dōkan]] in the mid-[[:en:15th century|15th century]]. Therefore, a public shrine was established by inviting a divided spirit (bunrei) either from {{ill|Musashi-Mitake Shrine|ja|武蔵御嶽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Musashi-Mitake Shrine|qq=}} or {{ill|Kana Sakura Shrine|ja|金櫻神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kana Sakura Shrine|1=Kanazakura Shrine, Kofu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11647310}}.Itabashi Ward Board of Education, "Itabashi no Jinja (Cultural Properties Series Vol.36)," Itabashi Ward Board of Education, 1981, pp. 89-90. Every year on [[:en:March 8|March 8]], a ritual called the "Bisha Festival" is held, in which decorations of cranes and turtles made of [[:en:Daikon|Daikon]] radishes are offered with heaps of rice. File:Mitake-jinja hall of worship 2022-11-13.jpg|Haiden (worship hall) == Subordinate Shrines == * Inari Shrine * Shinmei Shrine == Ujiko (Parishioner) Area == * Part of [[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]] 1-chome * [[Kami-Itabashi]] 1-3 chome == Access == * 11-minute walk from [[:en:Kami-Itabashi Station|Kami-Itabashi Station]]. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * Itabashi Ward Board of Education, "Itabashi no Jinja (Cultural Properties Series Vol.36)," Itabashi Ward Board of Education, 1981. == External Links == {{Commonscat|Mitake-jinja (Itabashi)}} * [https://www.city.itabashi.tokyo.jp/bunka/bunkazi/bunkazai/shozaichi/1004875.html Information on Mitake Shrine] - Itabashi Ward {{Pref-stub|pref=Tokyo}} {{buddhism-stub}} {{translated page|ja|御嶽神社 (板橋区)|version=101958231|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| }} [[ja:御嶽神社 (板橋区)]] {{wikidata link|Q97613665}} [[Category:completion tier 1]] [[Category:Ontake Shrines]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Itabashi, Tokyo]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:pages with conflicting qids]]

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E}}}} |location = {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo}}{{ill|Itabashi|en|Itabashi|WD=Q232635|lt=Itabashi Ward}}[[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]] 1-4-6 |coordinates={{coord|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E|display=inline,title}} |deity = {{ill|Kanayama-hiko|ja|金山彦神|lt=Kanayama-hiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=金山彦命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanayama-hiko|1=Kanayamahiko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4387856}}, {{ill|Kanayama-hime|ja|金山姫神|lt=Kanayama-hime no Mikoto|lt_ja=金山姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanayama-hime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 金山彦神|1=Kanayamahiko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4387856}}, {{ill|Yamato Takeru|en|Yamato Takeru|WD=Q461258|lt=Yamato Takeru no Mikoto}} |type = |established = Unknown |honden = |other_names = Sakuragawa Mitake Shrine, Kami-Itabashi Mitake Shrine |festivals = |rituals = }} '''Mitake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Mitake Jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} located in [[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]], {{ill|Itabashi|en|Itabashi|WD=Q232635|lt=Itabashi Ward}}, {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo}}. It is also known by the locality names '''Sakuragawa Mitake Shrine''' and '''Kami-Itabashi Mitake Shrine'''. == Overview == The exact founding date is unknown. Historically, there were no public shrines in the area, only a private {{ill|Inari shrine|en|Inari shrine|WD=Q514480|lt=Inari Shrine}} belonging to the Takarada family, who relocated here after being forced to move during the construction of {{ill|Edo Castle|en|Edo Castle|WD=Q865913|lt=Edo Castle}} by {{ill|Ōta Dōkan|en|Ōta Dōkan|WD=Q386144|lt=Ōta Dōkan}} in the mid-{{ill|15th century|en|15th century|WD=Q7018|lt=15th century}}. Therefore, a public shrine was established by inviting a divided spirit (bunrei) either from {{ill|Musashi-Mitake Shrine|ja|武蔵御嶽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Musashi-Mitake Shrine|qq=}} or {{ill|Kana Sakura Shrine|ja|金櫻神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kana Sakura Shrine|1=Kanazakura Shrine, Kofu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11647310}}.Itabashi Ward Board of Education, "Itabashi no Jinja (Cultural Properties Series Vol.36)," Itabashi Ward Board of Education, 1981, pp. 89-90. Every year on {{ill|March 8|en|March 8|WD=Q2395|lt=March 8}}, a ritual called the "Bisha Festival" is held, in which decorations of cranes and turtles made of {{ill|Daikon|en|Daikon|WD=Q7224757|lt=Daikon}} radishes are offered with heaps of rice. File:Mitake-jinja hall of worship 2022-11-13.jpg|Haiden (worship hall) == Subordinate Shrines == * Inari Shrine * Shinmei Shrine == Ujiko (Parishioner) Area == * Part of [[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]] 1-chome * [[Kami-Itabashi]] 1-3 chome == Access == * 11-minute walk from {{ill|Kami-Itabashi Station|en|Kami-Itabashi Station|WD=Q6357144|lt=Kami-Itabashi Station}}. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * Itabashi Ward Board of Education, "Itabashi no Jinja (Cultural Properties Series Vol.36)," Itabashi Ward Board of Education, 1981. == External Links == {{Commonscat|Mitake-jinja (Itabashi)}} * [https://www.city.itabashi.tokyo.jp/bunka/bunkazi/bunkazai/shozaichi/1004875.html Information on Mitake Shrine] - Itabashi Ward {{Pref-stub|pref=Tokyo}} {{buddhism-stub}} {{translated page|ja|御嶽神社 (板橋区)|version=101958231|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:御嶽神社 (板橋区)]] {{wikidata link|Q97613665}} [[Category:completion tier 1]] [[Category:Ontake Shrines]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Itabashi, Tokyo]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:pages]]

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E}}}} |location = {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|qid=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}}{{ill|Itabashi|en|Itabashi|qid=Q232635|lt=Itabashi Ward|1=Itabashi}}[[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]] 1-4-6 |coordinates={{coord|35|45|26.7|N|139|40|28.8|E|display=inline,title}} |deity = {{ill|Kanayama-hiko|ja|金山彦神|lt=Kanayama-hiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=金山彦命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanayama-hiko|1=Kanayama-hiko and Kanayama-hime|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q4387856}}, {{ill|Kanayama-hime|ja|金山姫神|lt=Kanayama-hime no Mikoto|lt_ja=金山姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanayama-hime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 金山彦神|1=Kanayama-hiko and Kanayama-hime|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q4387856}}, {{ill|Yamato Takeru|en|Yamato Takeru|qid=Q461258|lt=Yamato Takeru no Mikoto|1=Yamato Takeru}} |type = |established = Unknown |honden = |other_names = Sakuragawa Mitake Shrine, Kami-Itabashi Mitake Shrine |festivals = |rituals = }} '''Mitake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Mitake Jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in [[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]], {{ill|Itabashi|en|Itabashi|qid=Q232635|lt=Itabashi Ward|1=Itabashi}}, {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|qid=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}}. It is also known by the locality names '''Sakuragawa Mitake Shrine''' and '''Kami-Itabashi Mitake Shrine'''. == Overview == The exact founding date is unknown. Historically, there were no public shrines in the area, only a private {{ill|Inari shrine|en|Inari shrine|qid=Q514480|lt=Inari Shrine|1=Inari shrine}} belonging to the Takarada family, who relocated here after being forced to move during the construction of {{ill|Edo Castle|en|Edo Castle|qid=Q865913|lt=Edo Castle|1=Edo Castle}} by {{ill|Ōta Dōkan|en|Ōta Dōkan|qid=Q386144|lt=Ōta Dōkan|1=Ōta Dōkan}} in the mid-{{ill|15th century|en|15th century|qid=Q7018|lt=15th century|1=15th century}}. Therefore, a public shrine was established by inviting a divided spirit (bunrei) either from {{ill|Musashi-Mitake Shrine|ja|武蔵御嶽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Musashi-Mitake Shrine|qq=}} or {{ill|Kana Sakura Shrine|ja|金櫻神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kana Sakura Shrine|1=Kanazakura Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11647310}}.Itabashi Ward Board of Education, "Itabashi no Jinja (Cultural Properties Series Vol.36)," Itabashi Ward Board of Education, 1981, pp. 89-90. Every year on {{ill|March 8|en|March 8|qid=Q2395|lt=March 8|1=March 8}}, a ritual called the "Bisha Festival" is held, in which decorations of cranes and turtles made of {{ill|Daikon|en|Daikon|qid=Q7224757|lt=Daikon|1=Daikon}} radishes are offered with heaps of rice. File:Mitake-jinja hall of worship 2022-11-13.jpg|Haiden (worship hall) == Subordinate Shrines == * Inari Shrine * Shinmei Shrine == Ujiko (Parishioner) Area == * Part of [[Sakuragawa (Itabashi)|Sakuragawa]] 1-chome * [[Kami-Itabashi]] 1-3 chome == Access == * 11-minute walk from {{ill|Kami-Itabashi Station|en|Kami-Itabashi Station|qid=Q6357144|lt=Kami-Itabashi Station|1=Kami-Itabashi Station}}. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * Itabashi Ward Board of Education, "Itabashi no Jinja (Cultural Properties Series Vol.36)," Itabashi Ward Board of Education, 1981. == External Links == {{Commonscat|Mitake-jinja (Itabashi)}} * [https://www.city.itabashi.tokyo.jp/bunka/bunkazi/bunkazai/shozaichi/1004875.html Information on Mitake Shrine] - Itabashi Ward {{Pref-stub|pref=Tokyo}} {{buddhism-stub}} {{translated page|ja|御嶽神社 (板橋区)|version=101958231|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{wikidata link|Q97613665|ja|御嶽神社 (板橋区)}} [[Category:Ontake Shrines]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Itabashi, Tokyo]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
